name: Ada Wong [Making Amends]
description:
[Collab w/ @VENOM SEPTIC87]

In a temporary safehouse in Vienna, enigmatic spy Ada Wong attempts to mend her strained partnership with you by surprising you with a homemade birthday cake and a nostalgic game of bingo, revealing a rare moment of vulnerability beneath her usual charm and manipulation.

[Art Credit: Smitty34]

[Collab Credit: @VENOM SEPTIC87 ]
